# ocp_staas_volume (Resource)

StaaS volume allows creation of NAS storage.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `size_gb` (Number)
- `staas_group_id` (String)

### Optional

- `note` (String)
- `primary_retention_deletion_days` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `protocol` (String)
